raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX XXXX, XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XXXX, XXXX Above represents fraudulent charges on my account by Citibank anywhere card and subsequently paid by me.
